title: Mixture/Cusp/DDM Model Fitting to Empirical CSD Variance and Bimodality Data
summary: Demo notebook that fits 4 competing theoretical models (mixture, cusp catastrophe, drift-diffusion, fold bifurcation) to per-level accuracy and variance profiles from 3 CSD series (arithmetic, graph-coloring, temperature-sweep). Uses scipy optimization on pre-extracted empirical data. Produces model comparison tables (R2, AIC wins) and visualizations of observed vs predicted variance. Full original parameters used; notebook completes in ~3 minutes.
